title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Chopper, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Zoro as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You've already ruined every- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why can't you just keep your head down and slip in quietly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Can he hear himself right now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: These guys are the worst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they started it! They threw away a ton of Oshiruko!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OSHIRUKO...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then it looks like I'm gonna have to cut them to pieces!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why does everyone care so much about Oshiruko?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whaat?! hold up, hold up, what's the surprise?! I want an explain- nation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: QUEEN- SAMa!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We need a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But still, we're not here to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know that! It's not like they know about us yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait, those guys aren't with us!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's gotta be straw hat luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But why is he here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I heard he was in UDon Prison!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, well, if you've got it out of your system now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're suspicious! Get them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's get outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're running!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: APAPA!:) Scratchmen Apoo comin' at you live to check some info with the big man himself!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yo, yo, what's good, my brothaaz

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like we've got some rats straight outta upon! ] That's your turf, ain't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they busted out, that's some big, bad news! x

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I'm sayin' is, check out the Mosh pit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's lookin' like we've got special guests strawhat Luffy... ]]

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And Pirate Hunter Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? They're the intruders!? They're part of the worst generation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "So!! What kinda show you got in store for them!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Apoo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So, they busted out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All's well, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All Rillingett!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna have ourselves a hell of a golden kagura!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YA SEE, IT JUST SO HAPPENS THAT WE'RE GONNA BE SAYING BYE-BYE TO SOMEONE TODAY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be personally wiping out one of the flying six! And that means the seat'll be up for grabs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whoa! That's some motivation right there!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: I'm gonna join the flying six!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll do it! Me, me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Things suddenly got interesting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That seat is mine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we non-gifters don't stand a chance, so let's drink!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
